titleStmt.title: SII 27.47: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 47. (A.R. No. 546 of 1929-30.) PADUVARI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in a field about three furlongs to the south-west of Roman-Catholic church.
This damaged record registers gifts of lands to several brahmins of Virūpākshapura probably by Virupaṇṇa-voḍeya, when mahāpradhāna Maleya-daṇṇāyaka was governing Bārakūru-rājya.

It is dated Śaka 1282, Vikāri, Kārttika śu. 1, Sunday. The cyclic year Vikāri corresponded with Śaka 1281 when the tithi occurred on Wednesday October 23 of 1359 A.D. But in the next year, Śaka 1282, Śārvarī, the details regularly correspond to 1360 A.D. October 11, which might be the intended date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga siracyuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrī . svastiśrī jayābhyu
daya śakavaruṣa 1282 vikāri saṁvatsarada kārttika śu 1 Ā da
lu śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāse
ge dappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrī vīra bukaṁṇa voḍeyara vi
jayarājyābhyudayadalu Ā bukaṁṇavoḍeyara nirū
padiṁ śrī manumahāpradhānaṁ maleyadaṁṇāykaru bārakū
ra rājyavanāḷuvalli bhaṭṭana bayidoralu virupaṁṇa voḍeya
rina virūpākṣa
barasikoṭṭa silāsāsana kramavaṁteṁdaḍe A virūpākṣa
purada brāhmaṇarige naḍavabāḷu bayidūru [tōḍa riṁdaṁ] mūlavā
gibaṁda kalavōṇiya bāḷapaḍu mūḍalu lōku kāḷiya
tōḍi nāgaradiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hoḷeyiṁda ba
ḍagalu paḍuvalu Aṇuveyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
ḍa dēra baḷiyavara bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya
voḷaguḷa gade mūgaṁḍugada mū 100 no jāḍiyalu niṭi
leya Aḍigaḷa makaḷiṁdaṁ krayavāgi baṁda bāḷa catusīme
jagadārādyara bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu tōḍiṁdaṁ baḍagalu veyi
jaṁṇana bāḷiṁda mūḍalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī ca
tusīmeya voḷaguḷa gade mūgaṇḍugada mūḷiṁ vupūrabāḷagaḍi
brāhmaṇariṁdaṁ krayavāgi baṁda hoḷiya keṟiya nāku gaḍi I
dara voḷaguḷa bāḷugaḍi mūgaṁḍugada mū 100 Aṁtu yi mū
ṟu ṭhāvina bāḷavoḷaguḷa nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgā
mi Aṣṭabhōga tējasāṁmyanela holamarapala sahitavāgi Ē
nuḷadanu maleyadaṁṇāykaru viropākṣapurada vritti vaṁ
tarugaḷu cavuḍapaṁgaḷu goraru dēvapaṁgaḷu trīlōca
na bhaṭaru hoḷaru yīśvarabaṭṭa bāḷabaṭaru maṁjaru A
ntu yī praje vṛttimaṁtarige sarbbamāṁnyavāgi hiraṁ
ṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭaru Ā
yeṁṭu praje vrittimaṁtaravoḷage cavuḍapaṁgaḷige vritti
tritīyaroḷu
ṁdu ya mūṟu ṭhāvina pāḷu
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
